channel.title: Work-experiences on Ishan Jandaur Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Work-experiences on Ishan Jandaur Portfolio

item.title: Work Experience
item.description: Flex Inc. (Formerly Flextronics Inc.) Location: Milpitas, CA Date: 6/22 - 9/22 My most recent internship was as a project engineer intern in New Product Introduction at a Tier 1 contract manufacturer. My main project was setting up an assembly line for Serve Robotics that assembles complicated, autonomous robots that deliver food in large cities. In this role, I frequently taught operators, conduct failure analysis, and improve design manufacturability for subassemblies.
